summary: Saved a feature expansion packet for LLMWikiBook, renamed the additive studio-v2 surface to llmwikibook across the frontend page/module namespace, and established /llmwikibook as the canonical route with /studio-v2 kept as a compatibility alias in the client router.

validations.name: alias route visual smoke
validations.note: SPA server returns the same index shell for both paths at HTTP level, so alias proof is based on browser-rendered surface plus the Navigate redirect declared in App.tsx.

follow_ups: Continue the additive page refinement packet on the canonical LLMWikiBook naming baseline.
Reduce remaining studio/control-panel copy and visual density now that the surface name is fixed.
If strict browser-level redirect proof becomes a release gate, add a dedicated E2E harness that records final client location after React Router navigation.
